args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON trim(replace(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = trim(replace(c.Id, '#', '')) WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', o.CreatedDate) = '2023-04' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON trim(replace(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = trim(replace(c.Id, '#', '')) WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', o.CreatedDate) = '2023-04' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE)) - julian(CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE))) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON trim(replace(o.ContractID__c, '#', '')) = trim(replace(c.Id, '#', '')) WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE)) = '2023-04' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;
